title: The Quine Ratchet
tagline: A prompt that improves the exact file defining how prompts improve files.
holy_shit: A prompt rewrote the exact file that defines how prompts rewrite files, kept only the passes it could re-prove, and then honestly told you where it wasn't allowed to decide for you.
powered_by: loop.prompt.md (self-configuring ratchet) + the rock-tumbler's real drift verifiers
agent_scenario: When you need a domain-agnostic improvement loop that discovers its own score, keeps only verified gains, and stops itself at genuine human-decision boundaries.
author: kody-w + Claude
